description: Style Note Casual dressing only gets better with these slip-on sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality - they're a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Product Details Forefoot and midfoot criss-crossing straps with mesh inlays An ankle strap with a pull loop (Velcro closure at the lateral side for a customised Fit) Stitch detailing for added strength Cushioned, nubuck foot-bed for maximum sweat-free protection and all-day comfort with printed branding Upper stitched to outsole for maximum durability Curved TPU outsole in ergonomic design with branched lugs for maximum grip on smooth surfaces and an arched midfoot Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
